assembly_context.name: 27inch_Monitor_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 27英寸显示器装配体，包含屏幕面板、两段式可调节立柱、圆形底座及VESA安装背板。支持左右旋转配合，立柱模拟上下调节后的固定状态。

global_coordinate_system.y_direction: Right side of Monitor (from front view)

design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for API calls.
Use XY plane as horizontal base for all parts unless specified.
Ensure concentricity for all cylindrical connections.
Screen panel is fixed relative to bracket; rotation is simulated by bracket orientation.

instances.name: Mount Bracket Instance
instances.placement_notes: Attached to inner tube top. Rotated 0 degrees (centered).

part.name: Mount Bracket
part.function: Connects inner tube to screen panel, allowing rotation.
part.shape: L-shaped or T-shaped bracket. Vertical part connects to inner tube top. Horizontal part attaches to screen back. Includes VESA hole pattern interface.

faces.name: bracket_vertical_back_face
faces.purpose: Mates with inner tube top area or surrounds it.
faces.normal_direction_relation: normal -Y (assuming Y is right, this faces back)

faces.name: bracket_screen_mount_face
faces.normal_direction_relation: normal -X (facing screen back if X is front)

axes.name: bracket_rotation_axis
axes.purpose: Axis of rotation relative to inner tube.

assembly_relation_notes: Rotation axis concentric with Inner Tube Top Axis.
Screen mount face coincident with Screen Back Face.
VESA holes concentric with Screen VESA holes.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create vertical plate sketch on YZ plane.
Create horizontal plate sketch on XY plane offset.
Add 4 holes (M4 size approx 4.5mm) in 100x100 pattern on horizontal plate face.
Define rotation axis through center of vertical connection.
